Operation 'getDogeBlock' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Get block data' is too generic. Description lacks clarity about parameter format and what constitutes the returned block data. Enhanced version specifies acceptable parameter formats and provides context about returned fields for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns block data by block hash or block height.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve Dogecoin block by hash or height
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed block information from the Dogecoin blockchain by either block hash or block height. The block_hash_or_height parameter accepts either a valid block hash (hexadecimal string) or a numeric block height. Returns complete block data including transactions, timestamps, difficulty, and mining information.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get block data' is too generic. Description lacks clarity about parameter format and what constitutes the returned block data. Enhanced version specifies acceptable parameter formats and provides context about returned fields for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getDogePrice' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about parameter format (numeric Unix timestamp in seconds), currency of returned price, and behavior when exact timestamp data is unavailable. Enhanced description provides these details for AI agents to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

data.current_description: Returns the Dogecoin price at a specific Unix timestamp.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the historical Dogecoin price at a specific Unix timestamp. The unix_timestamp parameter should be provided as a numeric value representing seconds since epoch (January 1, 1970 UTC). Returns the price in USD and other supported fiat currencies. If the exact timestamp has no data, the nearest available price point is returned.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about parameter format (numeric Unix timestamp in seconds), currency of returned price, and behavior when exact timestamp data is unavailable. Enhanced description provides these details for AI agents to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

message: Operation 'getDogeAddressSummary' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and appropriate. Description is vague about what 'basic statistics' includes and doesn't fully enumerate the returned fields. Enhanced description specifies exact metrics returned and clarifies the operation's use case for AI agents seeking address overviews.

data.current_description: Returns basic statistics for a Dogecoin address including transaction counts and value totals.
data.description_suggestion: Returns comprehensive statistics for a Dogecoin address including sent/received transaction counts, total transaction count, and aggregate value totals (sent, received, balance). Useful for obtaining a complete address overview in a single request.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description is vague about what 'basic statistics' includes and doesn't fully enumerate the returned fields. Enhanced description specifies exact metrics returned and clarifies the operation's use case for AI agents seeking address overviews.

message: Operation 'getDogeAddressTransactions' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate. Description lacks detail about pagination mechanics (page numbering), transaction data fields returned, and use case context. Enhanced description clarifies pagination behavior and specifies what transaction details are included to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and iteration requirements.

data.current_description: Returns paginated transactions for a Dogecoin address, 10 per page.
data.description_suggestion: Returns paginated transaction history for a Dogecoin address with 10 transactions per page. Requires page parameter (starting from 0) to retrieve specific result sets. Each transaction includes hash, value, confirmations, and timestamp. Use for iterating through an address's complete transaction history.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description lacks detail about pagination mechanics (page numbering), transaction data fields returned, and use case context. Enhanced description clarifies pagination behavior and specifies what transaction details are included to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and iteration requirements.

message: Operation 'getDogeUnspentOutputs' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is domain-appropriate. Description lacks pagination mechanics details and UTXO field information. Enhanced description clarifies page numbering, specifies UTXO data structure, and explains the operation's critical role in transaction construction, helping AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns paginated unspent outputs (UTXOs) for a Dogecoin address, 10 per page.
data.description_suggestion: Returns paginated unspent transaction outputs (UTXOs) for a Dogecoin address with 10 results per page. Requires page parameter (starting from 0). Each UTXO includes transaction hash, output index, value, and confirmation count. Essential for constructing transactions or determining spendable funds.
data.reasoning: Summary is domain-appropriate. Description lacks pagination mechanics details and UTXO field information. Enhanced description clarifies page numbering, specifies UTXO data structure, and explains the operation's critical role in transaction construction, helping AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getDogeTransaction' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Summary is clear and appropriate. Description is somewhat vague about what 'complete transaction data' includes. Enhanced description enumerates key transaction fields (inputs, outputs, value, fees, confirmations, timestamp) to give AI agents a precise understanding of available data and the operation's analytical capabilities.

data.current_description: Returns complete transaction data for a given Dogecoin transaction hash.
data.description_suggestion: Returns complete transaction data for a given Dogecoin transaction hash including inputs, outputs, value, fees, confirmations, and timestamp. Provides full transaction details for analysis or verification purposes.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description is somewhat vague about what 'complete transaction data' includes. Enhanced description enumerates key transaction fields (inputs, outputs, value, fees, confirmations, timestamp) to give AI agents a precise understanding of available data and the operation's analytical capabilities.
